title: Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candle - Shimmer Gold - Pack of 4 - Long Burning Time of 35 Hours - Interior Decoration - Unscented - Includes Natural Vegan Wax - No Palm Oil - 8 x 7 cm
features: Add a little shimmer and shine to your interior! Not only for festive moments, but all year round. Bolsius rustic candles Shimmer Gold features a sparkling gold tone with an extra glittering, metallic finish. The light boasts a height of 8 cm and burns for just about 35 hours. Made without palm oil, using vegan wax - with love for people and planet. Add some sparkle to the atmosphere of your home!
* Longer Burning Time * With Natural Vegan Wax * Without Palm Oil * Without Animal Grease * Metallic Finish * Perfect flame up to 35h

Make every moment a special moment! The light natural light of lights adds a unique warmth and atmosphere to your home. Bolsius Rustic Light Shimmer features a glittering, metallic finish and snuggles or tears. Made with natural vegan wax and without palm oil - with love for people and planet. The cotton wick is woven in such a way that your flame remains stable.

Glittering gold makes everything more stylish! This gold tone with metallic finish ensures a trendy and stylish touch. You can mix and match with any other color of Bolsius collection of rustic lights.

Bolsius collection Shimmer adds a little shimmer and shine to your interior! These rustic lights are available in 9 trendy colours and have a shimmering metallic shine. Available in 2 different sizes. Inspired by textures and shades of nature and made with love for people and planet. Without palm oil and animal fat, but with natural, vegan wax from olive oil, sunflower oil or rapeseed oil. Let your home glitter!

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Place the product in a safe place, not near combustible materials and not under direct sunlight. Use a sturdy placemat and make sure that the light cannot fall over. If you place multiple lights together, place them 10cm apart so they don't get warp off the heat. Please set the wick upright before light it and use a light extinguisher to avoid splashing.
